title: 小米汽车科技有限公司召回部分SU7标准版电动汽车
original_zh: 召回部分SU7标准版电动汽车，共计30931台
translation_en: Recall of certain SU7 Standard electric vehicles, totaling 30,931 units.
notes: Definitive State Administration for Market Regulation recall notice.

title: 小米汽车科技有限公司召回部分SU7标准版电动汽车
original_zh: 影响智能泊车辅助功能对静态障碍物的探测
translation_en: It may affect the intelligent parking-assistance function's detection of static obstacles.
notes: The notice attributes the risk to a software-strategy timing-synchronization abnormality.

title: 小米汽车科技有限公司召回部分SU7标准版电动汽车
original_zh: 通过汽车远程升级（OTA）技术，为召回范围内的车辆免费升级软件
translation_en: Provide a free software update to vehicles in the recall scope through over-the-air (OTA) technology.
notes: Official remedy stated in the recall notice.

title: 工业和信息化部 市场监管总局关于进一步加强智能网联汽车产品准入、召回及软件在线升级管理的通知
original_zh: 避免企业通过OTA升级隐瞒车辆缺陷或规避责任
translation_en: Prevent companies from using OTA upgrades to conceal vehicle defects or evade responsibility.
notes: Document 工信部联通装〔2025〕45号; issued after the Xiaomi recall and used only as later regulatory context.

title: 市场监管总局关于2025年全国汽车和消费品召回情况的通告
original_zh: 实施远程升级（OTA）召回13次，涉及车辆175.6万辆
translation_en: Thirteen OTA recalls were implemented, involving 1.756 million vehicles.
notes: Context for the broader 2025 Chinese recall environment; not proof about Xiaomi specifically.
